extraction.one_line_summary: GODDU David threw his bike to steal the uphill finish from celebrating WOUT van Aert who sat up 5 meters early
tactical_patterns: B&B Hotels deployed four riders to breakaway then attacked on Côte de Salvert despite missing KOM points, revealing team GC ambition.
TotalEnergies burned domestiques faster than planned protecting VUILLERMOZ's jersey, with GOUGEARD dropped early from break chase.
Van Aert celebrated prematurely before actual finish line on steep ramp, losing all momentum on gradient when sitting up.

rider_signals.VUILLERMOZ Alexis: negative: Jumbo-Visma accidentally lost yellow jersey to him day prior, then lost it back within 24 hours
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Celebrated victory 5 meters early on steep ramp, sat up losing momentum and stage to late bike throw
rider_signals.GODDU David: positive: Timed bike throw perfectly on steep finish after van Aert error, gains 6-second GC advantage before TT weakness
rider_signals.VERMAERKE Kevin: neutral: Disappointed with missed opportunity previous day but salvaged white jersey as consolation
rider_signals.JORGENSEN Matteo: positive: Movistar climber moved into white jersey with top-5 finish, emerged as unexpected GC card
